key_risks: Hot June payrolls on exit day could spike yields and hurt rate-sensitive holdings
Geopolitical escalation from Iran strikes could shift risk appetite unpredictably
AI/tech rebound could leave defensive portfolio lagging SPY

portfolio.rationale: Strong recent catalyst with EMA approvals supporting sector; defensive with low beta and positive momentum into a week with payrolls risk.
Steepening curve, falling 10y yield, strong breadth; at 52w highs with solid recent momentum supported by rate backdrop.
Defensive tilt ahead of jobs report and holiday-shortened week with AI/tech weakness weighing on cap-weighted indexes.
EMA approval catalyst plus strong 30d momentum; biotech leadership in healthcare rally.
10y yield declining, softening sentiment data and tech weakness support duration into payrolls.

portfolio_rationale: Defensive tilt favoring healthcare/low-vol and rate-sensitive regional banks given AI/tech-led index weakness, falling yields, and payrolls catalyst on exit date.
rationale_summary: Overweight healthcare and biotech on EMA catalyst, regional banks on curve steepening, low-vol for stability, and long duration as hedge into NFP.
